title: Good Morning and Good Night
original_title: Trời sáng rồi, ta ngủ đi thôi
overview: After a chance encounter during a ride-hailing motorbike ride, young musician Vinh Tam and female driver Giang Thanh decided to spend a day exploring Saigon together.
